task_close_missing_fields: итог: выполнена полностью, частично или не выполнена

content: The Pro planner always interprets every user request.
Bitrix receives one exact version-bound command and must not reinterpret free text or choose another tool.
PostgreSQL remains inside the Bitrix data gateway; it never grants access. Current-user ACL/OAuth verification is mandatory before facts are returned.
Resolve every named warehouse to an exact store_id from entity_catalog before dispatch.
Show/find/list warehouse phrases return warehouse contents by default; list all warehouses only when explicitly requested.
Use pages of 50 positive-stock product rows: product_limit=50 and product_offset=0 for the first page; continue with offsets 50, 100 and so on in the same numbered branch.
Two or more named warehouses become independent parallel commands, one exact store_id per command.
An unqualified task request means active tasks involving the requester as responsible, creator or member.
A named employee must resolve to one exact target_user_id from entity_catalog; never widen an unresolved person to scope=all.
Closed, deferred or declined tasks are included only when explicitly requested.
If responsible is omitted, use the requester exact user ID.
Default deadline is three working days at 19:00 Moscow.
If project is omitted, use the responsible employee personal open project named by surname and first name.
If that personal project is missing, prepare its open-project draft and preserve the linked task draft; do not silently create outside a project.
Writes always use a 15-minute numbered draft and exact numbered confirmation.
If date and time are both omitted, default to three working days from now at 12:00 Moscow.
Default duration is 30 minutes and default owner/participant is the requester.
Keep every explicitly supplied date, time, title and participant unchanged.
Writes always use a 15-minute numbered draft and exact numbered confirmation.
Resolve named projects to one exact project_id from entity_catalog before a dependent command.
A personal project created by default is open and available for other employees to join.
Project reads are returned only after current-user live ACL verification.
portal_search is only for documents/files and uses the PostgreSQL index as candidates.
Every returned document/file must pass current-user live Bitrix access verification; stale unverifiable candidates are suppressed.
Default page size is 10. A continuation advances only the numbered branch that owns the stored page.
Task closure uses the four-block draft: completed work, equipment/materials, additional information, overall status with explicit unfinished/unconfirmed points.
Never mark unfinished or unconfirmed points as completed.
Confirmation applies only to the exact numbered branch and exact stored draft.
